truths.truth: A grab sample represents wastewater conditions at one specific moment.
A composite sample represents wastewater conditions over time or flow.
The standard BOD test duration is five days.
Air bubbles in a BOD bottle can affect dissolved oxygen readings.
Improper dilution can cause inaccurate BOD results.
Volatile solids generally represent the organic portion of solids.
Lab instruments must be calibrated regularly for accurate results.
